title: Another. (Predestination)
content:
Art thou not destin'd? then with haste go on
    To make thy fair predestination:
    If thou can'st change thy life, God then will please
    To change, or call back, His past sentences.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another. (Predestination)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
